title: Improve task handoff workflow
summary: Improved manuscript task hand-off workflow by adding task-packet rules, a reusable packet template, and a self-contained M49 packet preserving the original user prompt and scientific acceptance criteria.

user_inputs.text: Improve manuscript task creation and management so fragile scientific tasks use self-contained hand-off packets rather than thin task-board rows, and create the packet structure needed for M49.

agent_actions.description: Updated the local manuscript skill, manuscript rules, task board, dashboard, paper map, workplan, formal registry, decision/user/session/Codex logs, and created manuscript/tasks/_template.md plus manuscript/tasks/M49-dw-source-and-noisy-moment-audit.md.

checks.description: skill quick_validate.py: passed; python scripts/check_manuscript.py: passed with expected open-milestone warning before closure; python -m json.tool manuscript/formal-object-registry.json: passed; git diff --check: passed with line-ending warnings only
